short_text: Stoinis to Ben Shikongo, Caught by Tim David!! A fine catch by David at mid-on as Namibia have been cleaned up for 72. T
full_text: Stoinis to Ben Shikongo, Caught by Tim David!! A fine catch by David at mid-on as Namibia have been cleaned up for 72. This was on the fuller side and Ben Shikongo got a leading edge towards mid-on. David is quick to move to his left and puts in a dive to finish things off. A professional performance by the Aussies.

short_text: Stoinis to Ben Shikongo, no run, banged in short by Stoinis, Ben Shikongo ducks for cover
full_text: Stoinis to Ben Shikongo, no run, banged in short by Stoinis, Ben Shikongo ducks for cover

full_text: Stoinis to Ben Shikongo, no run, pitched up by the bowler on off, Ben Shikongo knocks it to cover

full_text: Stoinis to Ben Shikongo, no run, on a length around middle and leg, Ben Shikongo nudges it to mid-wicket

short_text: Stoinis to Erasmus, Caught by Maxwell!! Erasmus' fighting knock comes to an end. A length delivery by Stoinis and Erasmu
full_text: Stoinis to Erasmus, Caught by Maxwell!! Erasmus' fighting knock comes to an end. A length delivery by Stoinis and Erasmus swings it towards the leg-side. Was a skier and Maxwell charges in to complete a safe catch in front of him. Australia just a wicket away from cleaning up Namibia.

short_text: Stoinis to Erasmus, , back-to-back wides by Stoinis, this was outside off again
full_text: Stoinis to Erasmus, , back-to-back wides by Stoinis, this was outside off again

full_text: Stoinis to Erasmus, , sprays this delivery outside off, a wide ball out of Erasmus' reach

full_text: Stoinis to Erasmus, no run, pitched up by the bowler outside off, Erasmus looks to whip this towards the leg-side, connects thin air

full_text: Cummins to Jack Brassell, no run, a productive over for Namibia. Cummins ends the over with a short ball as Jack Brassell sways away from its line

full_text: Cummins to Erasmus, 1 run, banged in short again as Erasmus drags it to deep backward square leg with a pull, stopped by the fielder

full_text: Cummins to Erasmus, , deep into the stands. One of the cleanest hits of the evening. On the shorter side, Erasmus picks the bones out of it and smashes it over deep mid-wicket for a

full_text: Cummins to Erasmus, 2 runs, width on offer as Erasmus slaps it over the infield at cover for a couple of runs

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Erasmus, , Erasmus adding some crucial runs. Nathan Ellis goes short on off and Erasmus guides it over the keeper's head as he gets a top edge. Can't place a fielder there as Namibia move to 60/8

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Erasmus, , sloppy fielding by Hazlewood. A juicy high full toss on leg, Erasmus swipes it towards fine leg where Hazlewood misfields and gifts away a boundary to the Namibian skipper

full_text: Hazlewood to Erasmus, , short in length on off, Erasmus makes room and thumps it towards wide long-off. The ball almost clears the boundary, just lands in front of the cushions

full_text: Hazlewood to Erasmus, no run, tries to make room and guide this short ball over the keeper, fails to make contact though

full_text: Hazlewood to Erasmus, no run, short of a length on off, Erasmus rides the bounce, steering this to point off his back foot

short_text: Zampa to Scholtz, Bowled!! A googly on off, this ball spins back sharply to beat Scholtz's off drive. The off pole goes
full_text: Zampa to Scholtz, Bowled!! A googly on off, this ball spins back sharply to beat Scholtz's off drive. The off pole goes for a toss and Namibia are eight down. Another low score on the cards. Such has been this tournament.

short_text: Zampa to Scholtz, no run, tossed up delivery on middle and leg, nudged to mid-wicket by Scholtz
full_text: Zampa to Scholtz, no run, tossed up delivery on middle and leg, nudged to mid-wicket by Scholtz

short_text: Zampa to Trumpelmann, Caught by Maxwell!! Maxwell is everywhere on the field. He has taken most of the catches today. Th
full_text: Zampa to Trumpelmann, Caught by Maxwell!! Maxwell is everywhere on the field. He has taken most of the catches today. This was on the shorter side and Trumpelmann pulls it straight to the Big Show at deep mid-wicket. He had to move to his left and completed the catch without breaking a sweat. Zampa have a fun game. Conceded a six but has the last laugh.

short_text: Zampa to Trumpelmann, , A juicy full toss by Zampa and Trumpelmann has smoked this over deep mid-wicket for a clean six.
full_text: Zampa to Trumpelmann, , A juicy full toss by Zampa and Trumpelmann has smoked this over deep mid-wicket for a clean six.

full_text: Zampa to Erasmus, 1 run, tad short on off, Erasmus slices it in front of point for a single

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Trumpelmann, no run, on a length around off, knocked in front of cover

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Trumpelmann, no run, full and wide outside off, Trumpelmann goes for a drive away from his body, gets beaten due to the movement

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Erasmus, 1 run, more of a forehand smash towards mid-on as Nathan Ellis goes short

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Erasmus, no run, way too short on off, Erasmus attempts a flashy cut, gets beaten for the pace and bounce

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Erasmus, no run, short and wide outside off, Erasmus attempts a cut, gets beaten due to the lack of bounce

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Erasmus, 2 runs, slower delivery on off, Erasmus tries to take him on, swings early and slices it cover wide mid-off for a couple of runs, just eludes the fielder charging back

full_text: Zampa to Trumpelmann, no run, way too full on off, Trumpelmann squeezes it back to Zampa

short_text: Zampa to Wiese, Caught by Hazlewood!! The wickets keep tumbling. On the shorter side around middle and leg, Wiese lofts
full_text: Zampa to Wiese, Caught by Hazlewood!! The wickets keep tumbling. On the shorter side around middle and leg, Wiese lofts this towards wide long-on and Hazlewood in the deep completes a good sliding catch to his right. Namibia are six down, Zampa with his second scalp of the match.

short_text: Zampa to Wiese, no run, flatter delivery on off, Wiese knocks it back to the bowler
full_text: Zampa to Wiese, no run, flatter delivery on off, Wiese knocks it back to the bowler

full_text: Zampa to Wiese, byes, , tossed up delivery outside off, Wiese goes for a drive and gets beaten. The keeper fails to grab it and that's four byes

full_text: Cummins to Wiese, 1 run, fired on middle and leg, Wiese flicks it to fine leg for a single

full_text: Cummins to Wiese, no run, yorker length delivery, well directed by Cummins as Wiese looks to flick it away, gets an inside edge on to the shoe

full_text: Cummins to Erasmus, 1 run, banged in short by Cummins, nice pace and bounce, Erasmus goes for a pull and mistimes it towards backward square leg, nowhere close to the middle of the bat

short_text: Cummins to Erasmus, , much needed for Namibia. Back of a length delivery on off, Erasmus clears his front leg and smashe
full_text: Cummins to Erasmus, , much needed for Namibia. Back of a length delivery on off, Erasmus clears his front leg and smashes this over wide mid-off for a rollicking boundary

full_text: Zampa to Wiese, no run, flatter delivery on off, probably a googly as Wiese knocks it in front of cover from within the crease

short_text: Zampa to Zane Green, Lbw!! Was just a matter of time! A tossed up delivery on off, on the fuller side, Zane Green goes f
full_text: Zampa to Zane Green, Lbw!! Was just a matter of time! A tossed up delivery on off, on the fuller side, Zane Green goes for a sweep and gets rapped on the pads. Looked plumb and the umpire didn't waste any time to raise his finger. Zane Green doesn't waste any time by going up for the review because he knew he was gone.

short_text: Zampa to Zane Green, no run, googly outside off, Zane Green gets beaten as the ball turns away sharply
full_text: Zampa to Zane Green, no run, googly outside off, Zane Green gets beaten as the ball turns away sharply

short_text: Zampa to Erasmus, 1 run, a cheer by the crowd as Erasmus opens his account finally. Took 17 balls to get his first run a
full_text: Zampa to Erasmus, 1 run, a cheer by the crowd as Erasmus opens his account finally. Took 17 balls to get his first run and he looks relieved, has a smile on his face. Was a low full toss as Erasmus paddled it to fine leg

short_text: Zampa to Erasmus, no run, was the googly and Erasmus got rapped on the pads as he tried to lap this towards the on-side.
full_text: Zampa to Erasmus, no run, was the googly and Erasmus got rapped on the pads as he tried to lap this towards the on-side. Impact outside off and the Aussies have lost a review

full_text: Zampa to Zane Green, 1 run, low full toss on leg, Zane Green paddles it to fine leg for a single

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Erasmus, no run, fantastic over by Nathan Ellis. This was full in length and Erasmus pushed it to mid-on from wtihin the crease

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Zane Green, leg byes, 1 run, fired on leg, off the batter's pads for a leg bye

short_text: Nathan Ellis to Smit, Lbw!! Nathan Ellis strikes in his first over. Back of a length delivery on leg, the ball nips back
full_text: Nathan Ellis to Smit, Lbw!! Nathan Ellis strikes in his first over. Back of a length delivery on leg, the ball nips back in sharply to beat Smit's defence. Rapped on the pads and the replays confirm this would have crashed into the leg-stump. None of the Namibia batters have looked comfortable today. The Australian pacers are absolutely choking them with relentless bowling.

short_text: Nathan Ellis to Smit, no run, superb bowling. On a length outside off, seaming away from the batter, Smit has a poke at
full_text: Nathan Ellis to Smit, no run, superb bowling. On a length outside off, seaming away from the batter, Smit has a poke at it, gets beaten as the ball nips away. Almost nicked it behind

full_text: Nathan Ellis to Smit, no run, slower delivery outside off, Smit looks to slice it away, gets beaten due to the lack of pace and bounce

full_text: Hazlewood to Michael van Lingen, Caught by Maxwell!! The wicket keeps tumbling. On the shorter side and Michael van Lingen has sliced it to backward point. Maxwell fumbles on the first attempt, but manages to take it on the second. Namibia in trouble with three down within the powerplay. Top notch stuff by the Aussies.

full_text: Cummins to Erasmus, no run, a wicket maiden by Cummins. Short of a length around off, Erasmus knocks it to mid-off from within the crease

short_text: Cummins to Jan Frylinck, Caught by Mitchell Marsh!! Another one bites the dust. This was pitched up by Cummins and Jan F
full_text: Cummins to Jan Frylinck, Caught by Mitchell Marsh!! Another one bites the dust. This was pitched up by Cummins and Jan Frylinck chips it straight to Marsh at mid-off. Marsh takes it with ease and Jan Frylinck departs just for a single. Australia on top as they have taken a couple of wickets already, nothing much on the scoreboard either.

full_text: Cummins to Jan Frylinck, no run, short of a length on middle and leg, Jan Frylinck swings it across the line, mistimes it towards mid-wicket

full_text: Cummins to Jan Frylinck, no run, 135.1kph, back of a length around off, Jan Frylinck knocks it in front of cover

full_text: Cummins to Jan Frylinck, no run, on a length around off, Jan Frylinck steers it towards the fielder at point

full_text: Hazlewood to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Jan Frylinck opens the bat face, steers it down to third man for one

full_text: Hazlewood to Jan Frylinck, no run, short of a length outside off, Jan Frylinck chops it in front of backward point

short_text: Hazlewood to Davin, Caught by Maxwell!! Hazlewood draws first blood! A short and wide ball outside off and Davin has cut
full_text: Hazlewood to Davin, Caught by Maxwell!! Hazlewood draws first blood! A short and wide ball outside off and Davin has cut this straight to Maxwell at backward point. He doesn't have to move an inch as Maxwell takes a nonchalant reverse cup. Hazlewood has his first scalp of the match.

short_text: Hazlewood to Davin, no run, cramped for room around middle and leg, Davin looks to heave it across the line, gets hit on
full_text: Hazlewood to Davin, no run, cramped for room around middle and leg, Davin looks to heave it across the line, gets hit on the thigh pad

full_text: Hazlewood to Davin, no run, back of a length on off, shapes back in, Davin goes for a cut and gets beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Stoinis to Michael van Lingen, , pitched up by the bowler as Michael van Lingen drills this to the long-on boundary off his front foot. Lovely timing on that

full_text: Stoinis to Michael van Lingen, no run, short of a length on middle and leg, pulled to short mid-wicket by Michael van Lingen

full_text: Stoinis to Michael van Lingen, no run, back of a length around off, knocked to cover by Michael van Lingen

full_text: Stoinis to Davin, 1 run, banged in short by Stoinis, hurries the batter with pace, Davin goes for a pull, doesn't middle it though, just a single over the bowler's head as the timing wasn't good enough

full_text: Stoinis to Davin, no run, short of a length around off, Davin defends it from within the crease

full_text: Hazlewood to Michael van Lingen, , first boundary of the match! Short and wide outside off, Michael van Lingen throws his hands at it and the outside edge flies to the third man fence

full_text: Hazlewood to Michael van Lingen, no run, width on offer outside off, Michael van Lingen slashes away from his body, doesn't connect as it shapes away

full_text: Jack Brassell to Mitchell Marsh, , Mitchell Marsh finishes it off in style. A length delivery outside off, he walks forward and drives in the air but wide of mid-off, races away

full_text: Jack Brassell to Mitchell Marsh, , Mitchell Marsh picks the slower ball and it's short, he pulls and clears deep mid-wicket, against the breeze but such is the power of the man

full_text: Jack Brassell to Mitchell Marsh, , into the gap. A short of length delivery outside off, Mitchell Marsh forces it on the rise and into the gap, between point and cover-point

full_text: Trumpelmann to Head, , even the hard length goes. A good length delivery on the stumps, Head makes room and drives it wide of mid-off. Hat-trick of boundaries

full_text: Ben Shikongo to Head, , can't bowl short. A harmless short delivery outside off, Head pulls it hard to the deep mid-wicket fence

full_text: Wiese to Warner, Caught by Trumpelmann!! Warner holes out and has a big smile on his face as he walks back. Not there for the loft outside off, fullish and it's straight up, mid-off makes no mistake with the reverse-cup. Warner wanted to finish this early but has fallen in the process.

full_text: Wiese to Warner, , and this has gone all the way, a short of length delivery on the body, Warner swivels and pulls over deep backward square leg, clean hit and flies 79m into the stands

full_text: Wiese to Warner, , fullish and wide outside off, Warner stands and slaps that wide of cover-point and extra-cover, right into the gap
